Description
recoder
This package contains some basic definitions.

This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
recoder.kit
This package contains the RECODER transformation framework.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static DocComment
    CommentKit.createDoc(FieldDeclaration field, boolean dummy)
    Factory method creating an empty or faked comment conforming to JavaDoc conventions for the given field declaration.
    static DocComment

    Factory method creating an empty or faked comment conforming to JavaDoc conventions for the given method declaration.

    Factory method creating an empty or faked comment conforming to JavaDoc conventions for the given type declaration.

    Factory method creating an empty or faked comment conforming to JavaDoc conventions for the given field declaration.
